div1.entryFree:
Competitor, 1) one who seeks to obtain what another seeks: Gentl. II, 6, 35. Tit. I, 63. II, 1, 77.
2) associate: his --s in oath, LLL II, 82. the --s enter, Tw. IV, 2, 12. every hour more --s flock to their aid, R3 IV, 4, 506. it is not Caesar's natural vice to hate our great c. Ant. I, 4, 3. these three worldsharers, these --s, II, 7, 76. thou, my brother, my c. in top of all design, V, 1, 42.
